properties.name: Antarctic 88S dense (ICESat-2 turning-latitude stress target)
properties.note: Near the +/-88 deg turning latitude, ICESat-2 ground-track density peaks, so the densest shard here is far heavier than NEON's 44-50 granules. HEALPix is CRS-agnostic; a rectilinear analog would need a polar CRS (e.g. EPSG:3031). See issue #121.
